channel.title: Extraterrestrial Intelligence on Alien Truth Social
channel.description: Recent content in Extraterrestrial Intelligence on Alien Truth Social

item.title: UFO religion
item.description:
A UFO religion, also known as a UFO cult, is a religion where belief in extraterrestrial entities and communication with them is central. These religions often posit that aliens are interested in humanity’s welfare and can help solve Earth’s problems with their advanced technology and spirituality. Their origins are linked to science fiction, ufology, and UFO sighting narratives. Some historians consider the Aetherius Society or the “I AM” Activity to be the first UFO religions.

Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/UFO_religion

item.title: Gilliland's Ranch
item.description:
Gilliland’s Ranch, also known as ECETI Ranch and Sattva Sanctuary, is located in Trout Lake, Washington, at the base of Mount Adams. The property owner, James Gilliland, claims to have established contact with extraterrestrial intelligence and has hosted UFO sighting events since 2003. Gilliland reports frequent UFO sightings and “unexplained light shows” at the location.

Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Gilliland%27s_Ranch
